overall.description: Nighttime drive through a rain-soaked modern city, crossing a railroad intersection with flashing warning signals and proceeding into a busy urban street lined with palm trees and illuminated skyscrapers. Game engine footage featuring realistic wet surface reflections and atmospheric neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban railroad crossing with warning barriers

events.description: passing through the lowered railroad crossing gates
exiting the railroad crossing zone and entering the open intersection

agents.ego_description: proceeding forward through the railroad crossing at moderate speed, approaching the warning signals

entered.detail: red and white striped crossing gate in the lowered position blocking the road
flashing red lights mounted on a striped pole
tall modern building with grid-patterned illuminated windows
tall street lamps casting reflections on the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a rainy night railroad crossing in a modern city. The camera approaches and passes through the lowered crossing gates with flashing red signals, while a tall glass office tower looms on the left. Wet asphalt reflects the street lights as the vehicle moves forward through the crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban intersection with palm tree median

events.description: white sedan passes by on the right side of the vehicle
black SUV passes by on the right side following the sedan

agents.ego_description: navigating through the intersection while maintaining forward momentum as other vehicles pass on the right

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving past the camera on the right side
black SUV following closely behind the white sedan

entered.detail: vertical traffic light pole showing red signal on the left sidewalk
cluster of palm trees planted in the center road median
low-rise commercial structure with illuminated windows and storefronts

segments.scene_description: Having cleared the railroad crossing, the scene opens into a wide urban intersection lined with palm trees. The camera proceeds through the multi-lane crossing as a white sedan and black SUV pass by on the right. Commercial buildings with glowing windows line the street while traffic signals and wet pavement reflections dominate the rainy night atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a restricted railroad crossing into the expansive openness of a rain-soaked urban intersection. It begins by approaching lowered crossing gates with flashing red signals, passing beneath the shadow of a looming glass office tower as wet asphalt reflects the surrounding city lights. As the vehicle clears the tracks, the scene opens into a wide multi-lane crossing where the claustrophobic crossing gives way to a street lined with palm trees. The camera then proceeds through the intersection, gliding past a white sedan and a black SUV while the environment shifts toward a vista of glowing commercial buildings and vibrant neon reflections on the drenched pavement.
